title: A graphic that shows the change of a status coloum of an item
excerpt:
I want to create a Graphic that i choose an elemente and a status coloum of that element and it shows the evolution of that status coloum in time of that elemente. 
I try to draw an exemple.

posts.author: IvanGentil (Ivan Gentil de Rosa Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @IvanGentil!

If I am understanding correctly, this type of feature is currently available on our CRM product.

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/8805401342482-The-Funnel-Chart

Can you let me know if this is along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: IvanGentil (Ivan Gentil de Rosa Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks, I didn’t knew this function. However when i open the settings, it’s blank

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh no! Can you please try duplicating the widget or creating a new one? If this doesn’t work, please try through an incognito window and let me know?
